subject: STT Customs
body:
Jeffrey

Due to Staffing issues,, customs cannot use North Ramp,, only PreClear in main building,..
Trump is suppose to depart 4pm,. Latest 4:30pm
Flight time: 2+25min

Do you want PBI customs or PreClear STT?

Thx
Larry

Sent from my iPhone
